final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing documentary editorial photo for a Weibo news/trending-topic banner image, intended for a viral Weibo post cover.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary photography, on-the-ground reportage feel, shot on a high-end smartphone, sharp details with dramatic light-shadow contrast
Composition: wide horizontal frame, 16:9, city skyline spanning full width, generous negative space in upper or lower register for overlaid text
Subject: urban dusk cityscape — hurrying pedestrians in the foreground, towering skyscrapers in the background reflecting the last glow of sunset, neon signs beginning to light up
Scene/backdrop: city street at golden hour transitioning to dusk, neon lights gradually brightening, warm sunset reflections on glass high-rises, real street atmosphere
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro — warm amber sunset glow from the horizon contrasting with cool emerging neon, high contrast, cinematic tension grounded in realism
Color palette: warm amber and deep orange sunset tones against cool blue-purple dusk sky, punctuated by neon accent colors (red, cyan, yellow)
Materials/textures: glass facade reflections, wet or dusty pavement, motion blur on pedestrians suggesting pace and energy
Text (verbatim): 大标题："城市里的安静时刻" · 副文："黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" · 水印："@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: strict 16:9 horizontal banner; text zones must be visually clear (sufficient contrast or negative space) so overlaid Chinese type remains legible; all three text elements placed — headline in prominent position, subtitle below, watermark at bottom-right
Avoid: staged or stock-photo aesthetic, overly clean CGI look, soft-focus or low-contrast rendering, Western city skyline iconography inconsistent with Chinese urban context
